rulings.Case Title: IN RE MARRIAGE OF RUTH YOMTOUBIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
rulings.Rulings: continued to june 17, 2019 (first available date). no later than noon on wednesday, june 12, 2019, petitioner must file an amended petition and declaration that are dated in the section in which the petition is verified (the penalty of perjury section). undated verifications are not valid. the amended declaration must also have attached to it a copy of the marriage license (declaration filed in support claims a copy of the license is attached, but it is not) and an explanation addressing why the person solemnizing the marriage did not return the license to the county clerk as required.
